brand.name: Ordre
brand.tagline: Purchase orders, without losing the thread.

landing.heroTitle: Know exactly what's committed, what's been invoiced, and how much is left to spend.
landing.heroSubtitle: Ordre tracks purchase orders, runs them through your team's approval rules, and reconciles every invoice line by line. No spreadsheets. No lost email threads.
landing.pillarCommitBody: Raise a purchase order with its line items — description, category, quantity, price. Save as a draft or send it up for approval.
landing.pillarApproveBody: The right people get notified, approve with a comment or reject with one. Every decision is logged, stamped, and searchable.
landing.pillarReconcileBody: Upload the invoice, map it back to the lines, and the remaining balance on each line updates instantly. When it hits zero, close the PO.
landing.previewTitle: One PO, four numbers that matter
landing.footerNote: Built for audiovisual production teams and small offices.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Pick up where you left off. We sign you in with your Google account.
login.error: Couldn't sign you in. Try again in a few seconds.

signup.title: Get started with Ordre.
signup.subtitle: One Google click and your workspace is ready. No credit card, no friction.
signup.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms and Privacy policy.
signup.error: Could not create your account. Please try again.

projects.listSubtitle: Each project is a space with its own suppliers, purchase orders, and members.

empty.title: You don't have any projects yet.
empty.body: Create your first project to start tracking purchase orders, approvals, and invoices.

projects.createSubtitle: A short name is enough. You can invite the rest of the team after.

dashboard.subtitle: {{project}} — overview.
dashboard.emptyMetricNote: Add data to see numbers here

emptyState.title: This project is still empty.
emptyState.body: Once you add suppliers, purchase orders, and invoices, you'll see committed, invoiced, and per-line remaining figures right here.

dashboard.recentActivityEmpty: No activity yet. Things your team does will show up here.
dashboard.stubNotice: The full views (POs, suppliers, approvals) land in the next iteration.

members.title: Project members
members.subtitle: {{count}} people have access to {{project}}.
members.addSubtitle: Enter the email of someone who already has an Ordre account.
members.emailNotFound: This person doesn't have an Ordre account yet. Ask them to sign in with Google first.

roleCaption.owner: Can edit everything and manage members.
roleCaption.editor: Can create and change POs, suppliers, and invoices.

members.cannotRemoveYourself: An owner can't leave while they're the only one.
members.ownerOnly: Only the owner can make changes here.

app.welcomeBody: Pick an existing project or create a new one to get started.
app.stubBody: Dashboard, PO list, reconciliation detail, PO creation, supplier directory, and the approvals queue are being ported from the reference prototype to Firestore-backed pages.

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist.
notFound.body: The link might be out of date, or the PO has moved.
notFound.projectBody: Either it doesn't exist or you don't have access. Go back to your projects.
